sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hih leitunga dahna khempeuh paai khia in,
Nitak hun ciangin ah, damdam lungngai
Thukpi-in phum inla, phatakpi’n seel in,
Jesuh kiangah gen in, thupha hong pia

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh kiangah gen in, na dahna thei hi,
Jesuh kiang gen lecin, huhna hong pia
Na lampi hong taan ciang, pai-in kaikhawm in,
Thungen in na dahna, na van zang ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Dahna lungkhamna tawh, khua a mial hangin,
Nang sang a gimzaw, midangte huh
Na dahna paaikhia in, thupha ngah nading,
Midangte ading zong, Jesuh kiang gen in.
